name: Dr. Srinivas Rao
bio: Dr. Srinivas Rao leads the Distributed Data Lab where he designs fault-tolerant consensus protocols for geo-replicated databases. His work on the 'QuorumShift' protocol demonstrated 40-percent latency reduction for cross-continent read-write transactions while maintaining strict serializability. He built a streaming SQL engine optimized for out-of-order event processing in IoT pipelines, handling 2 million events per second on commodity hardware. His group contributes actively to Apache Flink and maintains a benchmark suite for comparing distributed transaction concurrency control mechanisms.
